endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: PUT /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a blueprint definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/artifacts
endpoints.description: List artifacts for a given blueprint definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/artifacts/{artifactName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{ARTIFACTNAME}} with a real artifactname.

endpoints.name: PUT /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/artifacts/{artifactName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{ARTIFACTNAME}} with a real artifactname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/artifacts/{artifactName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{ARTIFACTNAME}} with a real artifactname.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions
endpoints.description: List published versions of given blueprint definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions/{versionId}
endpoints.description: Get a published version of a blueprint definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: PUT /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions/{versionId}
endpoints.description: Publish a new version of the blueprint definition with the latest artifacts. Published blueprint definitions are immutable.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions/{versionId}
endpoints.description: Delete a published version of a blueprint definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions/{versionId}/artifacts
endpoints.description: List artifacts for a version of a published blueprint definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprints/{blueprintName}/versions/{versionId}/artifacts/{artifactName}
endpoints.description: Get an artifact for a published blueprint definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLUEPRINTNAME}} with a real blueprintname. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{ARTIFACTNAME}} with a real artifactname.
